equipmentMods.trinket: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 25% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.horn: Kraken Seed: Running over a Kraken Seed will shoot projectiles that explode on impact, dealing the same damage as Kraken Seed.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 25% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.goblet: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm will stay for an additional 1 second, and increasing Eye of the Storm damage by 65% per 57% growth in size.
equipmentMods.horn: Eye of the Storm: The cloud will spawn two additional clouds, dealing the same damage as the eye of the storm iteself.
equipmentMods.trinket: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm grows larger by 57%.

equipmentMods.goblet: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 50% of the Vortex damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 50% of the Vortex damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.horn: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves increase their damage by 55% with each leap.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Totems: Your totems fire two additional arcane flames.

equipmentMods.goblet: Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 100% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Spark: Each spark propagates four additional times.

equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.

equipmentMods.goblet: Spinning Blade: Spawns another blade on the battlefield, dealing 50% of the main blade damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Spinning Blade: Shoots a shuriken from each blade, dealing 25% damage. For each shuriken, the spinning blades get 15% additional damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 100% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
equipmentMods.horn: Death Blade: Extend the duration Death Blade stays on the field by 2 seconds.
equipmentMods.trinket: Death Blade: Summon a smaller Death Blade that circles around the primary Death Blade and deals 130% damage. Each time a small death blade spawns, it adds 15% damage to Arcane spike.

equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.

equipmentMods.horn: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 100% damage and a bonus +15% for every additional orb.
Kraken Seed: Tentacles now remain on the battlefield for an additional 1.8 seconds.
equipmentMods.trinket: Kraken Seed: Kraken Seed shoots 3 tentacle dart, dealing 45% damage each.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire two additional orbs.
Blood Dragons: Dragons gain a 25% chance to trigger a Dragon Burst that deals 200% damage. Dragon Burst deals an additional 33% based on dragon size.
equipmentMods.horn: Fire Orbs: Once the Orb finishes charging, it explodes emitting a wave of Fire dealing 100% damage + 20% more damage for every extra second it charged.

equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon two additional Lightning bolts.
equipmentMods.horn: Blitz-Totems: Die Reichweite der Totems erhöht sich um 40 %. Totems verursachen zusätzlich 10 % Schaden für jedes Totem in ihrer Reichweite.
